reason: Fix 1: Create local Binder type alias so it's usable within the module
Fix 3: Add BinderService to the effect context
Fix 3: Use canonical BinderService instead of building empty inline binders
Import BinderError so we can include it in the Error union type
Include BinderError in the Error union since binder service operations can fail with it
Import binder's LaneState type for the updateStatus call
Cast StateTag to BinderLaneState for the updateStatus call since at runtime these are compatible string values
